what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that references a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
Target uses a board://item-24374392 URI scheme
notes: A lightweight ledger entry linking a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item 24374392 with a timestamp.
questions: What content or message does this attachment represent?
Does board_items imply the attachment is attached to or merely references the board item?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to do exactly what its metadata suggests: record an attachment reference to a board item.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped association between a channel memory artifact and a specific board item so it can be retrieved or correlated later.
contribution: A structured, timestamped bridge between a channel memory attachment and a board item, supporting cross-system reference without embedding the referenced content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment ledger entry (att-7a306ce5) in the dragnet-development channel with type board_items pointing to board://item-24374392, recorded at 2026-06-24T05:12:11Z.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a reference from a channel memory attachment to a specific board item for later lookup and correlation.
